title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
# Python bytecode & caches
__pycache__/
**/__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*.pyc
*.egg-info/
*.egg
dist/
build/

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS files
Thumbs.db
.DS_Store

# Sessions (runtime data, not for distribution)
sessions/*.json

# Memory runtime data (not for distribution)
memory/long_term/*.json
memory/long_term/index.json
memory/test*/

# Local secrets / environment files
.env
.env.*
!.env.example

# Common secret/config files
*.key
*.pem
secrets.*
config.local.*

# pytest cache
.pytest_cache/
